info.title: Inventory Management API
info.description: Multi-tenant inventory, purchasing, and sales API. Authenticated tenant routes require a Bearer token and `X-Organization-Id` header.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration, login, token refresh, and current user profile.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Product catalog CRUD within the active organization.

tags.name: Purchase Orders
tags.description: Purchase order lifecycle: draft, send, receive goods, record payments, and cancel.

post.description: Creates a new organization, owner user, and returns Passport OAuth tokens.

201.description: Organization and owner user created with OAuth tokens.

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns OAuth tokens with their organizations.
Exchanges a refresh token for a new access token.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user and organizations they belong to.
Returns a paginated list of products for the active organization.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

post.description: Creates a product scoped to the active organization.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

get.description: Returns a single product by ID within the active organization.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

put.description: Updates a product within the active organization.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a product within the active organization.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

post.description: Creates a draft purchase order. Requires an `Idempotency-Key` header.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key for safe retries. Replaying the same key with an identical payload returns the original response with `Idempotency-Replayed: true`.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of purchase orders for the active organization.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

get.description: Returns a purchase order with supplier, warehouse, and line items.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

200.description: Purchase order with related supplier, warehouse, and items.

put.description: Updates a draft purchase order. Only editable while status is `draft`.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

post.description: Transitions a draft purchase order to `sent` status.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

post.description: Cancels a draft or sent purchase order.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

post.description: Records a goods receipt against a sent or partially received purchase order and posts `purchase_in` stock movements.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.

201.description: Goods receipt recorded and stock updated.

post.description: Records a payment against a partially received or fully received purchase order.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Id
parameters.description: Active organization ID. The authenticated user must belong to this organization.
